events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his birthday

angles.name: rock legend
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74, a rock legend and one of the most iconic guitarists of all time, Brian May celebrates his birthday, we're playing the best of Queen on Nation Rocks

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83

angles.name: rock icon
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83, the Rolling Stones frontman has been entertaining us for decades, we're playing his greatest hits on Nation 60s, Nation 70s and Nation Rocks

events.title: MTV Launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: The first music television channel MTV launched with the Buggles' Video Killed The Radio Star

angles.name: music television
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago with the Buggles' Video Killed The Radio Star, a game changer for music television, we're playing the best of the 80s on Nation 80s

events.title: Oasis release Definately Maybe 32 years ago

angles.name: britpop

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago

angles.name: peace and love
angles.copy: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a celebration of peace, love and music, we're playing the best of the 60s on Nation 60s

angles.name: the king
angles.copy: We remember the King of Rock and Roll Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his death, playing his greatest hits on Nation 60s and Nation Easy
